place_folding_board.query: the worker places a white rectangular folding board at the center of a light purple shirt and aligns it with both hands

fold_shirt_around_board.query: the worker folds the left and right sides of a light purple shirt inward around a white folding board

turn_and_neaten_folded_shirt.query: the worker lifts the folded light purple shirt, turns it face up, and straightens its shape with both hands

stack_folded_shirt.query: the worker places the completed folded light purple shirt onto the finished stack at the upper side of the worktable
